user.title: Add a Powerbaas device
user.description: Choose which type of device you want to add.

p1_meter.title: Configure Powerbaas
p1_meter.description: Enter the host URL for your Powerbaas device

boiler_controller.title: Setup Boiler Controller
boiler_controller.description: Set up the Boiler Controller integration.

power_sensor.title: Choose Power Sensor Type
power_sensor.description: Pick how grid power is reported in Home Assistant. A net (signed) sensor is one entity that goes negative when exporting. A split setup uses two separate sensors for return (export) and usage (import).

power_sensor_net.title: Select Net Power Sensor
power_sensor_net.description: Choose a single sensor that reports net grid power (negative when exporting to the grid).

power_sensor_split.title: Select Return and Usage Sensors
power_sensor_split.description: Choose two separate sensors: one for power returned to the grid and one for power drawn from the grid. Both should always be 0 or positive.

device_config.title: Configure BC Module
device_config.description: Enter the URL or IP address of your BC module (e.g. {example_url}). Auto-discovered devices will pre-fill this field.

error.invalid_host: Invalid host URL format. Please use format like http://192.168.1.100
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the specified host. Check the URL and network connection.
error.no_power_sensors: No power sensors found in Home Assistant
error.entity_not_found: The selected entity was not found
error.invalid_sensor_type: Pick either net or split mode
error.sensors_must_differ: Return and usage sensors must be different entities
error.cannot_connect_device: Unable to reach the BC module
error.cannot_identify: Unable to determine the module identity

abort.unsupported_device: The discovered device is not a supported Powerbaas device
abort.p1_already_configured: A P1 meter is already configured for this Powerbaas integration

p1_meter_init.title: Configure Powerbaas Options
p1_meter_init.description: Update the host URL for your Powerbaas device

device_config.title: Update Module Settings
device_config.description: Adjust the BC module URL. The current URL is shown here.

power_sensor.title: Change Power Sensor Type
power_sensor.description: Pick how grid power is reported. Choose net for a single signed sensor or split for two separate return/usage sensors.

power_sensor_net.title: Select New Net Power Sensor
power_sensor_net.description: Choose a single sensor that reports net grid power (negative when exporting).

power_sensor_split.title: Select New Return and Usage Sensors
power_sensor_split.description: Choose two separate sensors: one for power returned to the grid and one for power drawn from the grid.
